_description: Project-local Agency-to-Structure Engine instances in this repo. SDE_Extraction starts research-heavy with ONE instance (sde-extraction-dev). When the website/UI/backend materializes later, expect a second instance (sde-extraction-app) to be added — mirroring the Summer 2026 Hub two-instance pattern.

instances.where_it_runs: Inside Claude Code sessions when Liz opens this repo for research or development work
instances.boundary: Currently the only instance. When -app lands, must NOT share product/user memory with this dev/research instance without explicit safe routing.

future_instances.status: not yet attached — pending web/UI materialization
future_instances.intended_when: Once research surfaces a product shape AND the website/backend/frontend is being built, this instance gets created with its own adapter + memory tag scope.
